ModifyDataset.name: Dataset name
ModifyDataset.visibilityScope:
Visibility scope
ALL_PEOPLE: Visible to everyone
ONLY_OWNER: Read/write by owner only
USER_GROUP: Available to specified scope
ModifyDataset.visibilityUser.name: User or user group name
ModifyDataset.visibilityUser.permission: Permission, enum values: r: read-only, rw: read-write
ModifyDataset.visibilityGroup.name: User or user group name
ModifyDataset.visibilityGroup.permission: Permission, enum values: r: read-only, rw: read-write
